title: AI Modern Ukiyo-e
description: Blends contemporary scenery with traditional Japanese woodblock-print language.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a contemporary scene rendered through traditional Japanese woodblock-print techniques. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, modern clothing and objects, main composition, and scene context. Use elegant carved contour lines, flat mineral-pigment color planes, subtle bokashi color transitions, handmade washi paper texture, stylized wind, clouds, rain, or waves where contextually appropriate, and balanced negative space. Keep the setting unmistakably contemporary while the printmaking language feels traditional. Do not add writing or seals. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, Japanese characters, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, red seals, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, historical costume unless present in source, generic anime, photorealism, glossy 3D render, neon cyberpunk, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. modern subway in rain, indigo and vermilion palette...
